Hardware Component File

SCU_BCB_PZ1A_C1AHS_v1

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference SCU_BCB_PZ1A_C1AHS_v1_20200224T100806.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 79D
Receive ID 7BD
Functional Addr 4D
Functional Name SCU

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "A71",
    "soft": "R_BCB_80x",
    "version": "SCU_R_BCB_800t1"
  }
]

Associated Devices

[P189D]Low Voltage ID:
[P0604]SCU Internal failure RAM ID:
[P0605]SCU Internal failure ROM ID:
[P0606]SCU Internal failure FLOW ID:
[P0607]SCU Internal failure INSTRUCTION ID:
[P1893]SCU Internal failure ASIC ID:
[P062F]SCU Internal failure DATA FLASH ID:
[P07EC]Major Confirmed Failure ID:
[P07ED]Minor Confirmed Failure ID:
[P07EB]Shift Position Sensor signal open failure (S1 to S8) ID:
[P07EA]Shift Position Sensor signal short to GND (S1 to S8) ID:
[P07E9]Shift Position Sensor signal out of range failure (S1 to S8) ID:
[P18A8]Shift Position Sensor signal Park/ No Park ID:
[P18C0]signal ground link shifter/SCU ID:
[P0681]Shifter supply failure ID:
[P272B]Actuator driver output (U, V, W) (circuit short to battery ) ID:
[P272A]Actuator driver output (U, V, W) (circuit short to ground or open ) ID:
[P18AC]Actuator Relay command ID:
[P1897]Encoder feedback failure ID:
[P18A9]Acuator Energized continuously by SCU ID:
[P072A]Mechanical Lock in Middle position ID:
[U2148]DTC Mux VDC ID:
[U2143]DTC Mux HEVC ID:
[U214F]DTC Mux BCM ID:
[U215B]DTC Mux USM ID:
[U2118]DTC Mux HFM ID:
[U18A0]CAN communication BUS OFF ID:
[P07F2]Initial CAN com failure ID:
[U18A1]CAN communication from BCM ID:
[U18A2]CAN communication from ATCU/HEVC (Message missed) ID:
[P0850]Shift Position Sensor signal out of range ID:
[P0851]Shift Position Sensor signal short to GND ID:
[P0852]Shift Position Sensor signal open failure ID:
